title: Indulgent Fermented Croatian Grain Baked Pastry
description: A rich, cheesy, and creamy pastry made with a mixture of grains, perfect for a warm evening. Made without onions or garlic for a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Combine Kamut flour, Spelt flour, Bulgur wheat, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 10 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Roll out the dough into a large rectangle, about 1/4-inch thick.
Spread the Cheese evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Dollop the Yogurt over the Cheese, followed by the Egg.
Fold the dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and puffed.
Let the pastry rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
Slice the pastry into thick slices and serve warm.
For an added touch, sprinkle with Sugar before serving.
Serve with melted Butter, if desired.
Note: If desired, use a pastry brush to apply a thin layer of egg wash to the pastry before baking for a golden glaze.
